description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized, upright human figure with a rounded head and simplified facial features. The body is wrapped or draped in a manner reminiscent of ancient Egyptian mummiform statues, with arms and legs not distinctly separated from the main form. The figure stands on a rectangular plinth, providing stability and a sense of monumentality. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with minimal textural detail, emphasizing the overall silhouette and form. The material appears to be a solid, matte white stone or plaster, giving the sculpture a clean and modern appearance. The lack of intricate detail or color draws attention to the shape and posture of the figure.
description: A smooth, stylized human figure sculpture with a rounded head and draped body, standing on a rectangular plinth and finished in matte white.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the head, chest, and the gentle curve of the draped body.
description_view_1: Front view revealing the symmetrical, rounded face and the full frontal drape of the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile and draped form seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head and the continuous, smooth drape down the back.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
